---
title: "scDiffCom-PostAnalysis"
output: html_document
---

<!-- Backward-compatible entry point. Knit from RStudio with working directory = scripts/ -->

```{r wrapper, include=FALSE}
post_index <- "scDiffCom/post_analysis/index.Rmd"
if (!file.exists(post_index)) {
  stop("Expected ", post_index, " relative to Thesis/CCC/scripts/")
}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("scDiffCom/post_analysis"))
```

```{r child = "scDiffCom/post_analysis/index.Rmd"}
```
